sources.notes: Tax treatment reference for final-pay components

sources.title: Key Recent Developments in China's Employment Law
Employee Termination in China: A Guide for Employers

consensus: Termination defensibility depends on legal basis + evidence completeness + consistent communication.
Final pay handling needs strict component-level control, not one-click 'full settlement' behavior.
Cross-functional ownership failures are the main source of dispute escalation.
uncertainties: City-level enforcement expectations and documentary sufficiency can differ in practice.
Case-specific treatment for disputed components may require local legal judgment before release.
